title: Dragonite Gear
description: Unleash the power of the End dimension with the Dragonite Gear mod! This mod introduces a new and exciting ore called Dragonite, which can be found exclusively in the End. Dragonite can be mined& crafted into tools, weapons, armor sets.
body:
Unleash the power of the End dimension with the Dragonite Gear mod! This mod introduces a new and exciting ore called Dragonite, which can be found exclusively in the End. Dragonite can be mined, processed and crafted into a full set of tools, armor, and weapons that surpass the capabilities of netherite gear.

 

**Recommended Addon Mods:**
- JEI to view recipes. 
- BetterCombat incase you want some cool animations for the weapons.

 

**Features:**
-     New Ore: Dragonite ore can be found in the End dimension, adding a fresh mining challenge for adventurers.
-     New Weapons: 2 Swords, A Bow and a Staff
-     New Tools: Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe
-     New Armor: Dragonite Armor!
-     Dragonite Forge: Used to Craft / Process or you can even use it in your pack to create your own recipes for it.

**Note:**
Dragonite Armor will have a resistence / strength effect when wearing full armor set, you can enable/disable or modify the effects within the config file.
